***
name: Pull Request
about: Submit changes to OpenDesk
title: "[PR]: "
labels: []
assignees: []

## Summary
Describe the change. What does this PR do?

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs update
- [ ] Build/CI
- [ ] Other

## Screenshots/GIFs (UI changes)
If UI changed, include before/after visuals.

## How to test
Provide steps for reviewers:
1. …
2. …
3. …

## Checklist
- [ ] I have tested this locally on Windows
- [ ] I updated documentation where needed (README/docs)
- [ ] I followed code style and kept changes focused
- [ ] No secrets or machine-specific paths are included
- [ ] Linked related issues (if any)

## Related issues
Closes #ISSUE or References #ISSUE

## Additional context
Anything else reviewers should know?
***
